DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta-pipeline` creates sanctioned MetaPipeline workspaces that describe transform steps and pipeline structure as explicit metadata.
Execute a modeled pipeline's serial task chain.
Required. MetaPipeline workspace that contains the modeled serial task chain.
Required. Pipeline name to execute.
Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used by transform tasks.
Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used by transform tasks.
Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Execute a modeled pipeline under an orchestration worker protocol.
Required. MetaPipeline workspace that contains the modeled serial task chain.
Required. Pipeline name to execute as a worker.
Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used by transform tasks.
Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used by transform tasks.
Required. Named pipe used for orchestration worker control messages.
Optional timeout while connecting to the orchestration control pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Execute one modeled transform-backed pipeline step.
Required. MetaPipeline workspace that contains the modeled step.
Required. Pipeline name containing the step.
Required. Pipeline task name or id to execute.
Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used by the step.
Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used by the step.
Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Execute the direct SQL Server runtime slice.
Required. MetaTransformScript workspace containing the script.
Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace containing script binding rows.
Required. TransformScript.Name or TransformScript.Id to execute.
Optional binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
Required. Shell-visible environment variable for the execution SQL Server connection.
Required for SELECT-kind scripts. Shell-visible environment variable for the target SQL Server connection.
Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
Bounded in-memory row buffer size. Default: 1000.
SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no command timeout.
Runtime target type family for InsertRows. Default: SqlServer.
Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Create or update the MetaPipeline operational DB.
Required. Shell-visible environment variable with a SQL Server connection string that can create the database.
Operational database name. Default: MetaPipeline.
Prune old MetaPipeline operational diagnostic logs.
Required. Shell-visible environment variable for the initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Required. Delete eligible diagnostic rows older than this retention window.
Report eligible rows without deleting them.
Add one Pipeline instance to a MetaPipeline workspace.
Required. Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update.
Required. Pipeline name.
Optional pipeline description.
Add one transform-backed step to a pipeline.
Required. Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update.
Required. Pipeline that receives the new serial step.
Required. TransformScript.Name or TransformScript.Id to model.
Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used for script selection.
Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used for binding selection.
Required. Shell-visible environment variable named by the modeled execution connection.
Optional step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the script name.
Optional binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
Required for SELECT-kind scripts. Shell-visible environment variable named by the modeled target connection.
Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
SELECT-kind target write model. The only supported value is insert-rows.
Bounded in-memory row buffer size for InsertRows. Default: 1000.
SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds for the transform execution. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
InsertRows target type family. Default: SqlServer.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta-pipeline add-step --workspace .\PipelineWS --pipeline CustomerLoad --step-name load-customers --script dbo.v_customer_load --transform-workspace .\TransformWS --binding-workspace .\BindingWS --execution-connection-env EXECUTION_DB --target-connection-env TARGET_DB --target dbo.TargetCustomer --target-write insert-rows --batch-size 1000

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Show a compact MetaPipeline workspace summary.
Required. MetaPipeline workspace to inspect.
